name: com.dmarkoff/mcp
title: DMARKOFF — DMARC, SPF & DKIM Analytics
description: DMARC analytics inside your AI assistant. Query domain health, SPF/DKIM records, compliance stats, sending sources, and anomaly reports directly from your DMARKOFF account.

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: DMARKOFF API key in the format 'Bearer YOUR_API_KEY'. Get yours at app.dmarkoff.com/account/mcp
